default.text: ⟦⟦ S̃l̃ĩd̃ẽ p̃ãt̃t̃ẽr̃ñs̃ r̃ẽq̃ũĩr̃ẽ s̃t̃ẽãd̃ỹ t̃r̃ãc̃k̃ĩñg̃ ãc̃r̃õs̃s̃ t̃h̃ẽ p̃l̃ãỹf̃ĩẽl̃d̃. ⟧⟧

overlap_taps.text: ⟦⟦ T̃ãp̃s̃ õc̃c̃ũr̃ w̃h̃ĩl̃ẽ s̃l̃ĩd̃ẽs̃ ãr̃ẽ ãc̃t̃ĩṽẽ,̃ l̃ĩm̃ĩt̃ĩñg̃ ãṽãĩl̃ãb̃l̃ẽ ãt̃t̃ẽñt̃ĩõñ. ⟧⟧

zigzag.text: ⟦⟦ S̃l̃ĩd̃ẽ p̃ãt̃t̃ẽr̃ñs̃ s̃h̃ĩf̃t̃ d̃ĩr̃ẽc̃t̃ĩõñ f̃r̃ẽq̃ũẽñt̃l̃ỹ ãc̃r̃õũs̃s̃ l̃ãñẽs̃. ⟧⟧

unclear_end.text: ⟦⟦ S̃õm̃ẽ s̃l̃ĩd̃ẽ ẽñd̃p̃õĩñt̃s̃ ãr̃ẽ ñõt̃ ĩm̃m̃ẽd̃ĩãt̃ẽl̃ỹ ṽĩs̃ĩb̃l̃ẽ. ⟧⟧
